gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一部用错位语音留言串起的浪漫奇遇，笑中带泪的治愈小品。
gems.whyWatchEn: A charming romantic comedy built on misdirected voicemails, blending humor and heartfelt grief into a surprisingly fresh love story.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松浪漫又带点泪点的观众，以及《电子情书》式现代奇缘爱好者。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of lighthearted yet emotional rom-coms and modern twists on serendipitous connections like 'You've Got Mail'.

gems.title: 火遮眼
gems.summary: 女儿在街头被拐走，店主（谢苗 饰）探寻一个复杂的犯罪网络，不择手段将女儿救回来。他唯一的盟友是一名记者（乔•塔斯利姆 饰）。这两个来自不同背景的人物必须学会相互信任、合作，运用自己不为人知的过去所赋予的格斗技能。
gems.summaryEn: After Wang Wei's daughter is kidnapped by a criminal network and he receives no help from the corrupt police, Wei sets out to find her himself. His only ally is Navin, a relentless journalist whose wi
gems.whyWatch: 谢苗联手乔·塔斯利姆，硬核打斗+父爱救赎的暗黑动作片。
gems.whyWatchEn: A gritty action-thriller with visceral fight choreography, driven by a father's relentless rescue mission and an unlikely alliance.
gems.audience: 追求真实打斗与黑暗氛围的动作片影迷，喜欢《疾速追杀》式硬汉复仇题材。
gems.audienceEn: Action fans who appreciate raw, practical fight scenes and dark revenge narratives akin to 'John Wick'.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 玩具们面对数字时代新挑战，怀旧与创新并存的温情冒险。
gems.whyWatchEn: A surprisingly thoughtful exploration of toys vs. technology, balancing nostalgia with fresh digital-age conflicts for a new generation.
gems.audience: 皮克斯老粉和亲子家庭，尤其适合想和孩子讨论屏幕时间与真实陪伴的家长。
gems.audienceEn: Pixar loyalists and families, especially parents seeking a conversation starter about screen time vs. real play.
